verses.latin_vulgate: Adam, Seth, Enos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָדָ֥ם שֵׁ֖ת אֱנֽוֹשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Adam, Seth, Enos,
verses.finnish_biblia: Adam, Set, Enos,
verses.king_james: Adam, Sheth, Enosh,

verses.latin_vulgate: Cainan, Malaleel, Jared,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קֵינָ֥ן מַהֲלַלְאֵ֖ל יָֽרֶד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Cainan, Malaleel, Jared,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kenan, Mahaleel, Jared,
verses.king_james: Kenan, Mahalaleel, Jered,

verses.latin_vulgate: Henoch, Mathusale, Lamech,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲנ֥וֹךְ מְתוּשֶׁ֖לַח לָֽמֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Henoc, Mathusale, Lamech,
verses.finnish_biblia: Henok, Metusala, Lamek,
verses.king_james: Henoch, Methuselah, Lamech,

verses.latin_vulgate: Noë, Sem, Cham, et Japtheth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֹ֥חַ שֵׁ֖ם חָ֥ם וָיָֽפֶת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Noe, Sem, Cham, and Japheth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Noa, Sem, Ham ja Japhet.
verses.king_james: Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Japheth : Gomer, et Magog, et Madai, et Javan, Thubal, Mosoch, Thiras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י יֶ֔פֶת גֹּ֣מֶר וּמָג֔וֹג וּמָדַ֖י וְיָוָ֣ן וְתֻבָ֑ל וּמֶ֖שֶׁךְ וְתִירָֽס׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, Thubal, Mosoch, Thiras.
verses.finnish_biblia: Japhetin lapset: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan ja Tubal, Mesek ja Tiras.
verses.king_james: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Gomer : Ascenez, et Riphath, et Thogorma.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י גֹּ֑מֶר אַשְׁכְּנַ֥ז וְדִיפַ֖ת וְתוֹגַרְמָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Gomer: Ascenez, and Riphath, and Thogorma.
verses.finnish_biblia: Gomerin lapset: Askenas, Riphatja, Togarma.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Gomer; Ashchenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Javan : Elisa et Tharsis, Cethim et Dodanim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י יָוָ֖ן אֱלִישָׁ֣ה וְתַרְשִׁ֑ישָׁה כִּתִּ֖ים וְרוֹדָנִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Javan: Elisa and Tharsis, Cethim and Dodanim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös Javanin lapset: Elisa ja Tarsisa, Kittim ja Dodanim.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Cham : Chus, et Mesraim, et Phut, et Chanaan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י חָ֑ם כּ֥וּשׁ וּמִצְרַ֖יִם פּ֥וּט וּכְנָֽעַן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Cham: Chus, and Mesrai, and Phut, and Chanaan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hamin lapset: Kus, Mitsraim, Put ja Kanaan.
verses.king_james: The sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Chus : Saba, et Hevila, Sabatha, et Regma, et Sabathacha. Porro filii Regma : Saba, et Dadan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י כ֔וּשׁ סְבָא֙ וַֽחֲוִילָ֔ה וְסַבְתָּ֥א וְרַעְמָ֖א וְסַבְתְּכָ֑א וּבְנֵ֥י רַעְמָ֖א שְׁבָ֥א וּדְדָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Chus: Saba, and Hevila, Sabatha, and Regma, and Sabathaca. And the sons of Regma: Saba, and Dadan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kusin lapset: Seba, Hevila, Sabta, Raema ja Sabteka; ja Raeman lapset: Sjeba ja Dedan.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Chus autem genuit Nemrod : iste cœpit esse potens in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכ֖וּשׁ יָלַ֣ד אֶת־נִמְר֑וֹד ה֣וּא הֵחֵ֔ל לִֽהְי֥וֹת גִּבּ֖וֹר בָּאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now Chus begot Nemrod: he began to be mighty upon earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kus siitti Nimrodin: tämä rupesi olemaan voimallinen maalla.
verses.king_james: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be mighty upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mesraim vero genuit Ludim, et Anamim, et Laabim, et Nephtuim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִצְרַ֡יִם יָלַ֞ד אֶת־[לוּדִ֧ים] (לודיים) וְאֶת־עֲנָמִ֛ים וְאֶת־לְהָבִ֖ים וְאֶת־נַפְתֻּחִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Mesraim begot Ludim, and Anamim, and Laabim, and Nephtuim,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mistraim siitti Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphutim,
verses.king_james: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,

verses.latin_vulgate: Phetrusim quoque, et Casluim : de quibus egressi sunt Philisthiim, et Caphtorim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־פַּתְרֻסִ֞ים וְאֶת־כַּסְלֻחִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָצְא֥וּ מִשָּׁ֛ם פְּלִשְׁתִּ֖ים וְאֶת־כַּפְתֹּרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Phetrusim also, and Casluim: from whom came the Philistines, and Caphtorim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös Patrusim ja Kaluhim, joista Philistealaiset ovat tulleet ja Kaphtorim.
verses.king_james: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (of whom came the Philistines,) and Caphthorim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Chanaan vero genuit Sidonem primogenitum suum, Hethæum quoque,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְנַ֗עַן יָלַ֛ד אֶת־צִיד֥וֹן בְּכֹר֖וֹ וְאֶת־חֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Chanaan begot Sidon his firstborn, and the Hethite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kanaan siitti Zidonin esikoisensa ja Hetin,
verses.king_james: And Canaan begat Zidon his firstborn, and Heth,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jebusæum, et Amorrhæum, et Gergesæum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַיְבוּסִי֙ וְאֶת־הָ֣אֱמֹרִ֔י וְאֵ֖ת הַגִּרְגָּשִֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Jebusite, and the Amorrhite, and the Gergesite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös Jebusin, Amorin ja Gergosin,
verses.king_james: The Jebusite also, and the Amorite, and the Girgashite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hevæumque et Aracæum, et Sinæum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַחִוִּ֥י וְאֶת־הַעַרְקִ֖י וְאֶת־הַסִּינִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Hevite, and the Aracite, and the Sinite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hevin, Arkin ja Sinin,
verses.king_james: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Aradium quoque, et Samaræum, et Hamathæum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָאַרְוָדִ֥י וְאֶת־הַצְּמָרִ֖י וְאֶת־הַחֲמָתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the Aradian, and the Samarite, and the Hamathite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Arvadin, Zemarin ja Hematin.
verses.king_james: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Sem : Ælam, et Assur, et Arphaxad, et Lud, et Aram, et Hus, et Hul, et Gether, et Mosoch.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שֵׁ֔ם עֵילָ֣ם וְאַשּׁ֔וּר וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד וְל֣וּד וַאֲרָ֑ם וְע֥וּץ וְח֖וּל וְגֶ֥תֶר וָמֶֽשֶׁךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Sem: Elam and Asur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Hus, and Hul, and Gether, and Mosoch.
verses.finnish_biblia: Semin lapset: Elam, Assur, Arphaksad, Lud ja Aram, Uts, Hul, Geter ja Masek.
verses.king_james: The sons of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram, and Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Meshech.

verses.latin_vulgate: Arphaxad autem genuit Sale, qui et ipse genuit Heber.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְפַּכְשַׁ֖ד יָלַ֣ד אֶת־שָׁ֑לַח וְשֶׁ֖לַח יָלַ֥ד אֶת־עֵֽבֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Arphaxad begot Sale, and Sale begot Heber.
verses.finnish_biblia: Arphaksad siitti Salan, ja Sala siitti Eberin.
verses.king_james: And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Heber nati sunt duo filii : nomen uni Phaleg, quia in diebus ejus divisa est terra ; et nomen fratris ejus Jectan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְעֵ֥בֶר יֻלַּ֖ד שְׁנֵ֣י בָנִ֑ים שֵׁ֣ם הָאֶחָ֞ד פֶּ֗לֶג כִּ֤י בְיָמָיו֙ נִפְלְגָ֣ה הָאָ֔רֶץ וְשֵׁ֥ם אָחִ֖יו יׇקְטָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to Heber were born two sons, the name of the one was Phaleg, because in his days the earth was divided; and the name of his brother was Jectan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eberille oli syntynyt kaksi poikaa: yhden nimi oli Peleg, että hänen aikanansa oli maa jaettu, ja hänen veljensä nimi oli Joktan.
verses.king_james: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg; because in his days the earth was divided: and his brother’s name was Joktan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jectan autem genuit Elmodad, et Saleph, et Asarmoth, et Jare,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיׇקְטָ֣ן יָלַ֔ד אֶת־אַלְמוֹדָ֖ד וְאֶת־שָׁ֑לֶף וְאֶת־חֲצַרְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־יָֽרַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jectan begot Elmodad, and Saleph, and Asarmoth, and Jare,
verses.finnish_biblia: Joktan siitti Almodadin ja Salephin, Hatsarmavetin ja Jaran,
verses.king_james: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Adoram quoque, et Huzal, et Decla,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הֲדוֹרָ֥ם וְאֶת־אוּזָ֖ל וְאֶת־דִּקְלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Adoram, and Usal, and Decla,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hadoramin, Usalin ja Diklan,
verses.king_james: Hadoram also, and Uzal, and Diklah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hebal etiam, et Abimaël, et Saba, necnon
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־עֵיבָ֥ל וְאֶת־אֲבִֽימָאֵ֖ל וְאֶת־שְׁבָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hebal, and Abimael, and Saba,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ebalin, Abimaelin ja Sjeban,
verses.king_james: And Ebal, and Abimael, and Sheba,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Ophir, et Hevila, et Jobab : omnes isti filii Jectan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־אוֹפִ֥יר וְאֶת־חֲוִילָ֖ה וְאֶת־יוֹבָ֑ב כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י יׇקְטָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ophir, and Hevila, and Jobab. All these are the sons of Jectan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ophirin, Hevilan ja Jobadin: nämät ovat kaikki Joktanin lapset.
verses.king_james: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sem, Arphaxad, Sale,
verses.douay_rheims: Sem, Arphaxad, Sale,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sem, Arphaksad, Sala,
verses.king_james: Shem, Arphaxad, Shelah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Heber, Phaleg, Ragau,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֥בֶר פֶּ֖לֶג רְעֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Heber, Phaleg, Ragau,
verses.finnish_biblia: Eber, Peleg, Regu,
verses.king_james: Eber, Peleg, Reu,

verses.latin_vulgate: Serug, Nachor, Thare,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂר֥וּג נָח֖וֹר תָּֽרַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: Serug, Nachor, Thare,
verses.finnish_biblia: Serug, Nahor, Tara,
verses.king_james: Serug, Nahor, Terah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Abram : iste est Abraham.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַבְרָ֖ם ה֥וּא אַבְרָהָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Abram, this is Abraham.
verses.finnish_biblia: Abram, se on Abraham.
verses.king_james: Abram; the same is Abraham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Abraham, Isaac et Ismahel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי֙ אַבְרָהָ֔ם יִצְחָ֖ק וְיִשְׁמָעֵֽאל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Abraham, Isaac and Ismahel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Abrahamin lapset: Isaak ja Ismael.
verses.king_james: The sons of Abraham; Isaac, and Ishmael.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæ generationes eorum. Primogenitus Ismahelis, Nabaioth, et Cedar, et Adbeel, et Mabsam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֖לֶּה תֹּלְדוֹתָ֑ם בְּכ֤וֹר יִשְׁמָעֵאל֙ נְבָי֔וֹת וְקֵדָ֥ר וְאַדְבְּאֵ֖ל וּמִבְשָֽׂם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these are the generations of them. The firstborn of Ismahel, Nabajoth, then Cedar, and Adbeel, and Mabsam,
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat heidän sukukuntansa: Ismaelin esikoinen Nebajot, Kedar, Adbeel ja Mibsam,
verses.king_james: These are their generations: The firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Masma, et Duma, Massa, Hadad, et Thema,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשְׁמָ֣ע וְדוּמָ֔ה מַשָּׂ֖א חֲדַ֥ד וְתֵימָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Masma, and Duma, Massa, Hadad, and Thema,
verses.finnish_biblia: Misma, Duma, Masa, Hadad ja Tema,
verses.king_james: Mishma, and Dumah, Massa, Hadad, and Tema,

verses.latin_vulgate: Jetur, Naphis, Cedma : hi sunt filii Ismahelis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְט֥וּר נָפִ֖ישׁ וָקֵ֑דְמָה אֵ֥לֶּה הֵ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׁמָעֵֽאל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Jetur, Naphis, Cedma: these are the sons of Ismahel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jetur, Naphis ja Kedma: nämät ovat Ismaelin lapset.
verses.king_james: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Ceturæ concubinæ Abraham, quos genuit : Zamran, Jecsan, Madan, Madian, Jesboc, et Sue. Porro filii Jecsan : Saba, et Dadan. Filii autem Dadan : Assurim, et Latussim, et Laomim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֨י קְטוּרָ֜ה פִּילֶ֣גֶשׁ אַבְרָהָ֗ם יָלְדָ֞ה אֶת־זִמְרָ֧ן וְיׇקְשָׁ֛ן וּמְדָ֥ן וּמִדְיָ֖ן וְיִשְׁבָּ֣ק וְשׁ֑וּחַ וּבְנֵ֥י יׇקְשָׁ֖ן שְׁבָ֥א וּדְדָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Cetura, Abraham's concubine, whom she bore: Zamran, Jecsan, Madan, Madian, Jesboc, and Sue. And the sons of Jecsan, Saba, and Dadan. And the sons of Dadan: Assurim, and Latussim, and Laomin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Keturan Abrahamin toisen emännän lapset, jotka hän synnytti: Simran, Joksan, Medan, Midian, Jesbak ja Sua; ja Joksanin lapset: Sjeba ja Dedan.
verses.king_james: Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Madian : Epha, et Epher, et Henoch, et Abida, et Eldaa : omnes hi filii Ceturæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י מִדְיָ֗ן עֵיפָ֤ה וָעֵ֙פֶר֙ וַחֲנ֔וֹךְ וַאֲבִידָ֖ע וְאֶלְדָּעָ֑ה כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י קְטוּרָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the sons of Madian: Epha, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaa. All these are the sons of Cetura.
verses.finnish_biblia: Midianin lapset: Epha, Epher, Henok, Abida ja Eldaa. Nämät ovat kaikki Keturan lapset.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these are the sons of Keturah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Genuit autem Abraham Isaac : cujus fuerunt filii Esau, et Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֥וֹלֶד אַבְרָהָ֖ם אֶת־יִצְחָ֑ק בְּנֵ֣י יִצְחָ֔ק עֵשָׂ֖ו וְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abraham begot Isaac: and his sons were Esau and Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abraham siitti Isaakin. Isaakin lapset olivat Esau ja Israel.
verses.king_james: And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Esau : Eliphaz, Rahuel, Jehus, Ihelom, et Core.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י עֵשָׂ֑ו אֱלִיפַ֛ז רְעוּאֵ֥ל וִיע֖וּשׁ וְיַעְלָ֥ם וְקֹֽרַח׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Rahuel, Jehus, Ihelom, and Core.
verses.finnish_biblia: Esaun lapset: Eliphas, Reguel, Jeus, Jaelam ja Korah.
verses.king_james: The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Eliphaz : Theman, Omar, Sephi, Gathan, Cenez, Thamna, Amalec.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י אֱלִיפָ֑ז תֵּימָ֤ן וְאוֹמָר֙ צְפִ֣י וְגַעְתָּ֔ם קְנַ֖ז וְתִמְנָ֥ע וַעֲמָלֵֽק׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Eliphaz: Theman, Omar, Sephi, Gathan, Cenez, and by Thamna, Amalec.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eliphan lapset: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gaetan, Kenas, Timna ja Amalek.
verses.king_james: The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Rahuel : Nahath, Zara, Samma, Meza.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י רְעוּאֵ֑ל נַ֥חַת זֶ֖רַח שַׁמָּ֥ה וּמִזָּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Rahuel: Nahath, Zara, Samma, Meza.
verses.finnish_biblia: Reguelin lapset: Nahat, Sera, Samma ja Missa.
verses.king_james: The sons of Reuel; Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Seir : Lotan, Sobal, Sebeon, Ana, Dison, Eser, Disan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י שֵׂעִ֔יר לוֹטָ֥ן וְשׁוֹבָ֖ל וְצִבְע֣וֹן וַעֲנָ֑ה וְדִישֹׁ֥ן וְאֵ֖צֶר וְדִישָֽׁן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Sobal, Sebeon, Ana, Dison, Eser, Disan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seirin lapset: Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon ja Ana, Dison, Etser ja Disan.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Lotan : Hori, Homam. Soror autem Lotan fuit Thamna.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י לוֹטָ֖ן חֹרִ֣י וְהוֹמָ֑ם וַאֲח֥וֹת לוֹטָ֖ן תִּמְנָֽע׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Lotan: Hori, Homam. And the sister of Lotan was Thamna.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lotanin lapset: Hori ja Homam; mutta Lotanin sisar oli Timna.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Lotan; Hori, and Homam: and Timna was Lotan’s sister.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Sobal : Alian, et Manahath, et Ebal, Sephi et Onam. Filii Sebeon : Aja et Ana. Filii Ana : Dison.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שׁוֹבָ֔ל עַלְיָ֧ן וּמָנַ֛חַת וְעֵיבָ֖ל שְׁפִ֣י וְאוֹנָ֑ם וּבְנֵ֥י צִבְע֖וֹן אַיָּ֥ה וַעֲנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Sobal: Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Sephi, and Onam. The sons of Sebeon: Aia, and Ana. The son of Ana: Dison.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sobalin lapset: Aljan, Manahat, Ebal, Sephi ja Onam. Sibeonin lapset ovat: Aija ja Ana.
verses.king_james: The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Dison : Hamram, et Heseban, et Jethran, et Charan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י עֲנָ֖ה דִּישׁ֑וֹן וּבְנֵ֣י דִישׁ֔וֹן חַמְרָ֥ן וְאֶשְׁבָּ֖ן וְיִתְרָ֥ן וּכְרָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Dison: Hamram, and Eseban, and Jethran, and Charan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anan lapset: Dison. Disonin lapset: Hamran, Esban, Jitran ja Karan.
verses.king_james: The sons of Anah; Dishon. And the sons of Dishon; Amram, and Eshban, and Ithran, and Cheran.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Eser : Balaan, et Zavan, et Jacan. Filii Disan : Hus et Aran.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּֽנֵי־אֵ֔צֶר בִּלְהָ֥ן וְזַעֲוָ֖ן יַעֲקָ֑ן בְּנֵ֥י דִישׁ֖וֹן ע֥וּץ וַאֲרָֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Eser: Balaan, and Zavan, and Jacan. The sons of Disan: Hus and Aran.
verses.finnish_biblia: Etserin lapset: Bilhan, Saevan, Jaekan. Disanin lapset: Uts ja Aran.
verses.king_james: The sons of Ezer; Bilhan, and Zavan, and Jakan. The sons of Dishan; Uz, and Aran.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isti sunt reges qui imperaverunt in terra Edom, antequam esset rex super filios Israël. Bale filius Beor : et nomen civitatis ejus, Denaba.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣לֶּה הַמְּלָכִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר מָֽלְכוּ֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ אֱד֔וֹם לִפְנֵ֥י מְלׇךְ־מֶ֖לֶךְ לִבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בֶּ֚לַע בֶּן־בְּע֔וֹר וְשֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖וֹ דִּנְהָֽבָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there was a king over the children of Israel: Bale the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Denaba.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat kuninkaat, jotka hallitsivat Edomin maalla, ennenkuin yksikään kuningas hallitsi Israelin lasten seassa: Bela Beorin poika, ja hänen kaupunkinsa nimi oli Dinhaba.
verses.king_james: Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortuus est autem Bale, et regnavit pro eo Jobab filius Zare de Bosra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת בָּ֑לַע וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו יוֹבָ֥ב בֶּן־זֶ֖רַח מִבׇּצְרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Bale died, and Jobab the son of Zare of Bosra, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Bela oli kuollut, tuli Jobab Seran poika Botsrasta kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And when Bela was dead, Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque et Jobab fuisset mortuus, regnavit pro eo Husam de terra Themanorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת יוֹבָ֑ב וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו חוּשָׁ֖ם מֵאֶ֥רֶץ הַתֵּימָנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Jobab also was dead, Husam of the land of the Themanites reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Jobab oli kuollut, tuli Husam kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa, Temanilaisten maalta.
verses.king_james: And when Jobab was dead, Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Obiit quoque et Husam, et regnavit pro eo Adad filius Badad, qui percussit Madian in terra Moab : et nomen civitatis ejus Avith.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת חוּשָׁ֑ם וַיִּמְלֹ֨ךְ תַּחְתָּ֜יו הֲדַ֣ד בֶּן־בְּדַ֗ד הַמַּכֶּ֤ה אֶת־מִדְיָן֙ בִּשְׂדֵ֣ה מוֹאָ֔ב וְשֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖וֹ (עיות) [עֲוִֽית]׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Husam also died, and Adad the son of Badad reigned in his stead, and he defeated the Madianites in the land of Moab: the name of his city was Avith.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Husam oli kuollut, tuli hänen siaansa kuninkaaksi Hadad Bedadin poika, joka löi Midianilaiset Moabilaisten kedolla; ja hänen kaupunkinsa nimi oli Avit.
verses.king_james: And when Husham was dead, Hadad the son of Bedad, which smote Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Avith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque et Adad fuisset mortuus, regnavit pro eo Semla de Masreca.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת הֲדָ֑ד וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו שַׂמְלָ֖ה מִמַּשְׂרֵקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Adad also was dead, Semla of Masreca reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Hadad oli kuollut, tuli hänen siaansa kuninkaaksi Samla Masrekasta.
verses.king_james: And when Hadad was dead, Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et Semla mortuus est, et regnavit pro eo Saul de Rohoboth, quæ juxta amnem sita est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת שַׂמְלָ֑ה וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו שָׁא֖וּל מֵרְחֹב֥וֹת הַנָּהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Semla also died, and Saul of Rohoboth, which is near the river, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Samla oli kuollut, tuli Saul Rehobotin virran tyköä kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortuo quoque Saul, regnavit pro eo Balanan filius Achobor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת שָׁא֑וּל וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ תַּחְתָּ֔יו בַּ֥עַל חָנָ֖ן בֶּן־עַכְבּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Saul was dead, Balanan the son of Achobor reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Saul oli kuollut, tuli Baal Hanan Akborin poika kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And when Shaul was dead, Baal–hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et hic mortuus est, et regnavit pro eo Adad : cujus urbis nomen fuit Phau, et appellata est uxor ejus Meetabel filia Matred filiæ Mezaab.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙מׇת֙ בַּ֣עַל חָנָ֔ן וַיִּמְלֹ֤ךְ תַּחְתָּיו֙ הֲדַ֔ד וְשֵׁ֥ם עִיר֖וֹ פָּ֑עִי וְשֵׁ֨ם אִשְׁתּ֤וֹ מְהֵֽיטַבְאֵל֙ בַּת־מַטְרֵ֔ד בַּ֖ת מֵ֥י זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He also died, and Adad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Phau, and his wife was called Meetabel the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezaab.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Baal Hanan oli kuollut, hallitsi hänen siassansa Hadad; ja hänen kaupunkinsa nimi oli Pagi. Ja hänen emäntänsä nimi oli Mehetabeel, Matredin tytär, Mehasabin tyttären.
verses.king_james: And when Baal–hanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adad autem mortuo, duces pro regibus in Edom esse cœperunt : dux Thamna, dux Alva, dux Jetheth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֖מׇת הֲדָ֑ד {פ}וַיִּֽהְיוּ֙ אַלּוּפֵ֣י אֱד֔וֹם אַלּ֥וּף תִּמְנָ֛ע אַלּ֥וּף (עליה) [עַֽלְוָ֖ה] אַלּ֥וּף יְתֵֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after the death of Adad, there began to be dukes in Edom instead of kings: duke Thamna, duke Alva, duke Jetheth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Hadad oli kuollut, olivat ruhtinaat Edomissa: ruhtinas Timna, ruhtinas Alja, ruhtinas Jetet,
verses.king_james: Hadad died also. And the dukes of Edom were; duke Timnah, duke Aliah, duke Jetheth,

verses.latin_vulgate: dux Oolibama, dux Ela, dux Phinon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַלּ֧וּף אׇהֳלִיבָמָ֛ה אַלּ֥וּף אֵלָ֖ה אַלּ֥וּף פִּינֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Duke Oolibama, duke Ela, duke Phinon,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ruhtinas Oholibama, ruhtinas Ela, ruhtinas Pinon,
verses.king_james: Duke Aholibamah, duke Elah, duke Pinon,

verses.latin_vulgate: dux Cenez, dux Theman, dux Mabsar,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַלּ֥וּף קְנַ֛ז אַלּ֥וּף תֵּימָ֖ן אַלּ֥וּף מִבְצָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Duke Cenez, duke Theman, duke Mabsar,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ruhtinas Kenas, ruhtinas Teman, ruhtinas Mibtsar,
verses.king_james: Duke Kenaz, duke Teman, duke Mibzar,

verses.latin_vulgate: dux Magdiel, dux Hiram : hi duces Edom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַלּ֥וּף מַגְדִּיאֵ֖ל אַלּ֣וּף עִירָ֑ם אֵ֖לֶּה אַלּוּפֵ֥י אֱדֽוֹם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Duke Magdiel, duke Hiram. These are the dukes of Edom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ruhtinas Magdiel, ruhtinas Iram: nämät ovat Edomin ruhtinaat.
verses.king_james: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These are the dukes of Edom.
